categories.name: Develop and Manage Products and Services

process_elements.name: Develop product design specifications
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Design of Experiments (DoE) for systematic parameter exploration. For tissue constructs, key design inputs: stiffness, porosity, cell density, scaffold material. Define Critical Quality Attributes (CQAs) before fabrication. Use QbD framework (ICH Q8) for design space mapping.

reading.title: ICH Q8(R2) — Pharmaceutical Development and Quality by Design

process_elements.name: Conduct product testing and validation
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Validation protocol: minimum 3 independent batches, n>=3 per batch. Primary readout reproducibility (CV < 20%). Compare to published benchmarks for target tissue. Validation lot must differ from development lot.

reading.title: Standardization of bioreactor and culture conditions for reproducible 3D tissue construct fabrication

categories.name: Produce and Deliver Products and Services

process_elements.name: Generate production schedules
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Rolling horizon scheduling with capacity buffers. Biological production requires minimum 48h lead time for cell preparation. Schedule adherence rate >90% correlates with batch success.

process_elements.name: Schedule material requirements
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Just-in-time biological material procurement is high risk. Maintain 2-week safety stock for critical cell culture components. Lot qualification testing mandatory before production use.

process_elements.name: Manufacture and prepare product
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Stage-gate execution with mandatory hold points. For biological systems, the seeding step is typically the highest-variance stage and should have dedicated QC verification before proceeding.

reading.title: Quality by Design in bioprocess development

process_elements.name: Perform production process control
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Statistical Process Control (SPC) for key process parameters. Control charts (X-bar, R-chart) for viability, TEER, secretion. 3-sigma control limits standard; biological systems may require wider limits (4-sigma) due to inherent biological variance.

process_elements.name: Test in-process materials
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Risk-based QC sampling. For 3D tissue constructs, minimum: viability (Day 1, Day 3, final), structural integrity (imaging), functional readout (assay-specific). Inline testing preferred over endpoint-only.

reading.title: USP <1046> Cell and Gene Therapy Products

process_elements.name: Document production activities
process_elements.best_practice_summary: ALCOA+ principles for data integrity: Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneous, Original, Accurate, plus Complete, Consistent, Enduring, Available. FDA 21 CFR Part 11 for electronic records in regulated contexts.

reading.title: FDA 21 CFR Part 11 — Electronic Records and Signatures

subcategories.name: Plan and Manage Customer Service Operations

process_elements.name: Plan and manage customer service workforce
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Service level agreements for construct delivery: define turnaround time, QC criteria, and rerun triggers. Track customer satisfaction by construct type. Correlate churn with specific lot/protocol combinations.

reading.title: The Goal: A Process of Ongoing Improvement

process_elements.name: Track and analyze cost of goods
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Activity-based costing for biofabrication: track cost per construct including materials, labor, QC, and overhead. Typical COGS breakdown: 40% materials (cells, media, scaffold), 30% labor, 20% QC/instruments, 10% overhead. Identify cost drivers per protocol step.

process_elements.name: Evaluate and select suppliers
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Supplier qualification: technical audit + minimum 3 incoming lots tested before production approval. For biological raw materials, qualification includes bioassay, endotoxin, and mycoplasma testing. Approved Supplier List (ASL) with re-qualification triggers.

reading.title: ICH Q7 — Good Manufacturing Practice for APIs

process_elements.name: Capture and apply process knowledge
process_elements.best_practice_summary: Process knowledge management: structured capture of deviation learnings, CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Action) integration, living protocol documentation that updates from real data. Knowledge half-life in bioprocess: ~18 months before key learnings are lost without systematic capture.

reading.title: The Goal: A Process of Ongoing Improvement
reading.note: Theory of Constraints — foundational for CCP thinking

reading.title: Process Mining: Data Science in Action
